name: Search for non existing employee shows no records
fullName: orangehrm-cucumber-playwright:src/features/employee.feature#Search for non existing employee shows no records
description:
As an HR admin
  I want to manage employees in OrangeHRM
  So that I can maintain accurate employee records
descriptionHtml:
As an HR admin
I want to manage employees in OrangeHRM
So that I can maintain accurate employee records

testStage.description:
As an HR admin
  I want to manage employees in OrangeHRM
  So that I can maintain accurate employee records

steps.name: Given I am on the OrangeHRM login page
When I enter username "Admin" and password "admin123"
Then I should be redirected to the dashboard
When I navigate to the PIM module
Then I should see no records found
